name: Island Merge war
description: Island Merge War is a fun and addictive strategy game where players build, merge, and upgrade to grow their island empire. Collect resources, strengthen your base, and lead your army into battle against enemies across the sea. Merge units and structures to unlock stronger power, expand your territory, and dominate the battlefield. With colorful visuals, simple controls, and exciting progression, this game offers nonstop action and rewarding gameplay.
instructions: Suggestions amp feedback at epicentergames90 gmail com
